name: Grilled Herb Mustard Steaks
recipeIngredient: 2 bonesless beef top loin or rib eye steak, 1 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Make sure your steaks are well trimmed from fat.
In a glass measuring cup, combine the garlic and water; microwave for 30 seconds on HIGH.
2. Stir in the remaining mustard ingredients (dijon mustard, pepper, and thyme) into the mixture. Spread evenly onto both sides of the beef steaks.
3. Place the steaks on the grill over medium ash-covered coals. Grill the top loin steaks uncovered for 16 to 18 minutes (rib eye steaks for 12 to 14 minutes), turning occasionally, until they reach your desired doneness.
4. Season the steaks with salt as desired. Using a sharp knife, carve the steaks crosswise into thick slices.
